ORDER GRANTING TRIAL PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D)

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-07-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MTN TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 10/24/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 10/14/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL INDICATED THAT THE CASE IS AT-ISSUE IN OPEN COURT. PATHOLOGY DUE BY 7/29/05. COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING AUTHORIZATIONS. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 9/9/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON FEB-15-2006. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON OCT-24-2005 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON OCT-14-2005 AT 9:30 AM. ALL EXPEDITED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS WILL BE HEARD AT THAT TIME IN DEPT. 608.
